depression.description: I'm constantly stressed about our finances, especially since Ivan isn't working full-time. It feels like I'm carrying the weight of everything on my shoulders.
I often feel like my efforts go unnoticed, especially when Ivan doesn't contribute as much. It makes me feel unlovable and unwanted.
I find myself taking on all the household responsibilities because I feel like I have to. It's exhausting, and I don't know how to ask for help without feeling guilty.

depression.topic: Fear of confronting Ivan about issues
depression.description: I worry that if I bring up my feelings about Ivan not helping, it will just push him away. I don't want to hurt him, but I also feel trapped.
I've been journaling to process my feelings, but sometimes it feels like I'm just writing about the same issues over and over without any resolution.

Delusion.description: Whenever Ivan's mother criticizes me, I feel like I'm not valued or appreciated. It makes me question my place in their family.

Delusion.topic: Belief that I must solve others' problems
Delusion.description: I feel this overwhelming need to fix everything for everyone around me, but it just leaves me feeling drained and unfulfilled.
